Observing the pattern, Y seems to be directly proportional to A and inversely proportional to B. Therefore, Y = k * (A / B). From the initial observation, when A = 10.0 and B = 5.0, Y = 15.0. So, k = 15.0. Hence, Y = 15.0 * (A / B).
